title: euphorbia pulvinata
intro: Euphorbia pulvinata, also known as the cushion bush or ball cactus, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of euphorbines, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia pulvinata include infusions, tinctures, and ointments that can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
